text.title: docker-image-optimization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for docker-image-optimization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: COPY . . before dependency install: any source file change invalidates the dependency layer.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Re-downloads all packages on every source change, turning 2-second rebuilds into 3-minute rebuilds.

failure-mode.description: Separate RUN commands for each apt-get install line.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each RUN creates a new layer; chaining with && combines them into one layer and allows removing the apt cache in the same step (rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*). Separate layers bloat the image and cannot clean up from a prior layer.
